name: io.github.xtofuub/frida-mcp-server
description: MCP server for authorized iOS app inspection with Frida — network capture/replay/fuzz, storage, ObjC/Swift runtime, crypto hooks, SSL/JB bypass. 67 tools, zero FLEX dependency.

environmentVariables.name: FRIDA_MCP_PYTHON
environmentVariables.description: Python executable used to launch the server (must have frida + mcp installed). Defaults to python/python3.
